title: cyperus aureus var. oligostachyus
intro: Cyperus aureus var. oligostachyus, also known as the smallflower umbrella-sedge or little umbel flat-sedge, is a perennial plant species in the sedge family, characterized by its slender stems and yellow or greenish-yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Cyperus aureus var. oligostachyus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots, stems, and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
